meaning: n.莫哈韦沙漠(在美国加利福尼亚西南)
examples: For protection from the summer sun, the Mojave lived in open-sided, flat-topped dwellings known as shades, each a roof of poles and arrow weed supported by posts set in a rectangle.
And we hadn't even reached the Mojave Desert yet.
Solar panels in the Mojave desert cover many kilometres.
Virgin has recruited a dedicated team to design and build LauncherOne in Mojave and Pasadena, California.
The Army intends to build a 500mw solar plant at Fort Irwin in the Mojave Desert.
